finding: An authenticated retained replay ledger must still fail closed when stale, future-dated, structurally unsupported, or internally malformed before it can influence a deployment evidence run.

verification.runtime: isolated Node test runner using byte-equivalent logic
covered: malformed entry rejection without raw-value disclosure
unsupported schema and missing generation time rejection

privacy_boundary: The decision emits counts, age, reason codes, and no replay-key values.
trust_limit: Acceptance authorizes replay comparison only. It does not prove ledger completeness, atomic insertion, deployment success, scientific truth, or medical truth.
deployment_status: not attempted; C-001 remains blocked on protected Cloudflare credentials and workflow dispatch
